```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<style>
:root{--bg:#f5f7fa;--card:#ffffff;--card-hover:#fafafe;--text:#2c3e50;--text-dim:#6c7a89;--text-muted:#95a5a6;--accent:#6c5ce7;--accent-light:#a29bfe;--accent-pink:#e84393;--accent-warm:#fd79a8;--border:#e0e6ed;--border-light:#f0f2f5;--fs-xs:11px;--fs-sm:12px;--fs-md:14px;--fs-lg:16px}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
body{background:transparent;display:flex;justify-content:center;font-family:'Noto Sans SC','PingFang SC','Microsoft YaHei',sans-serif;line-height:1.6;padding:6px}
.container{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;max-width:480px;width:100%}
.topbar{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6c5ce7,#fd79a8);border-radius:10px;padding:8px 12px;color:#fff;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(108,92,231,.12)}
.topbar-t{font-size:var(--fs-lg);font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:1px}
.topbar-s{font-size:var(--fs-xs);opacity:.88}
.topbar-r{text-align:right;font-size:var(--fs-xs);opacity:.8}
.girl-card{background:var(--card);border-radius:10px;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.04);overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.girl-h{padding:6px 12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-light);cursor:pointer;user-select:none}
.girl-h:hover{background:var(--card-hover)}
.girl-h .gf{font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);transition:transform .2s;margin-left:auto}
.girl-h .gf.open{transform:rotate(90deg)}
.girl-av{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:var(--fs-md);font-weight:bold;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0}
.girl-info{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.girl-n{font-size:var(--fs-md);font-weight:bold}
.girl-r{font-size:var(--fs-xs);color:var(--text-dim)}
.girl-b{padding:6px 12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}
.girl-b.collapsed{display:none}
.sl{font-size:var(--fs-xs);color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:1px;border-bottom:1px dashed var(--border);padding-bottom:2px;margin-top:4px;font-weight:bold}
.row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:var(--fs-sm);padding:1px 0}
.rl{color:var(--text-dim);flex-shrink:0;min-width:56px}
.rv{color:var(--text);text-align:right}
.diary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#faf5ff,#fff5f8);border:1px solid var(--border-light);border-radius:6px;padding:8px}
.dl{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:4px;font-size:var(--fs-sm);line-height:1.55;padding:2px 0}
.dl+.dl{border-top:1px dotted var(--border-light)}
.di{color:var(--accent-warm);flex-shrink:0;width:14px;text-align:center}
.dt{color:var(--text);flex:1}
.sb-r{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:var(--fs-sm)}
.sb-l{color:var(--text-dim);flex-shrink:0;min-width:56px}
.sb-f{flex:1;height:6px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden}
.sb-i{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent-light),var(--accent-warm));border-radius:3px}
.sb-p{color:var(--accent-pink);flex-shrink:0;min-width:30px;text-align:right;font-size:var(--fs-xs)}
.mono{background:var(--bg);border-left:2px solid var(--accent-warm);padding:3px 6px;font-size:var(--fs-sm);color:var(--text-dim);font-style:italic;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;margin-top:4px;line-height:1.5;min-height:16px}
.footer{background:var(--card);border-radius:10px;padding:6px 12px;text-align:center;font-size:var(--fs-xs);color:var(--text-dim);box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.04);border:1px solid var(--border)}
.placeholder{text-align:center;padding:24px;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:var(--fs-sm)}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="container" id="root"><div class="placeholder">读取变量中...</div></div>
<script>
(function(){
  try{
    var msgId=getCurrentMessageId(),msgs=getChatMessages(msgId),sd=null;
    for(var i=0;i<msgs.length;i++){if(msgs[i]&&msgs[i].data&&msgs[i].data.stat_data){sd=msgs[i].data.stat_data;break}}
    if(!sd){document.getElementById('root').innerHTML='<div class=placeholder>等待变量初始化...</div>';return}

    function gv(o,p,d){if(!o||!p)return d||'';var k=p.split('.'),c=o;for(var i=0;i<k.length;i++){if(c===null||typeof c!=='object')return d||'';c=c[k[i]];if(c===undefined)return d||''}return c===null||c===undefined?d||'':String(c)}

    var ca=sd['纯爱'];if(!ca){document.getElementById('root').innerHTML='<div class=placeholder>纯爱变量组缺失</div>';return}
    var sc=ca['场景']||{},chars=ca['在场角色']||{};

    var gradients=['linear-gradient(135deg,#a29bfe,#6c5ce7)','linear-gradient(135deg,#fd79a8,#e84393)','linear-gradient(135deg,#55efc4,#00b894)','linear-gradient(135deg,#fdcb6e,#e17055)','linear-gradient(135deg,#74b9ff,#0984e3)','linear-gradient(135deg,#ff7675,#d63031)'];

    var html='<div class=topbar><div><div class=topbar-t>白帝学园</div><div class=topbar-s>奉天市 · '+gv(sc,'时间')+'</div></div><div class=topbar-r><div>'+gv(sc,'天气')+'</div></div></div>';

    var charNames=Object.keys(chars);
    if(charNames.length===0){
      html+='<div class=placeholder>暂无在场角色</div>';
    }else{
      for(var idx=0;idx<charNames.length;idx++){
        var name=charNames[idx],c=chars[name]||{};
        var firstChar=name.charAt(0);
        var gradient=gradients[idx%gradients.length];
        var fav=parseInt(gv(c,'好感度','0'))||0;
        var trust=parseInt(gv(c,'信任度','0'))||0;

        html+='<div class=girl-card><div class=girl-h><div class="girl-av" style="background:'+gradient+'">'+firstChar+'</div><div class=girl-info><span class=girl-n>'+name+'</span><span class=girl-r>'+gv(c,'心情')+'</span></div><span class=gf>▶</span></div><div class=girl-b>';
        html+='<div class=sl>穿 着</div><div class=row><span class=rl>今日</span><span class=rv>'+gv(c,'穿着')+'</span></div>';
        html+='<div class=row><span class=rl>心情</span><span class=rv>'+gv(c,'心情')+'</span></div>';
        html+='<div class=sl>外貌特征</div><div class=diary>';
        html+='<div class=dl><span class=di>♡</span><span class=dt>'+gv(c,'外貌特征')+'</span></div>';
        html+='</div><div class=sb-r><span class=sb-l>好感度</span><div class=sb-f><div class=sb-i style=width:'+fav+'%></div></div><span class=sb-p>'+fav+'%</span></div>';
        html+='<div class=sb-r><span class=sb-l>信任度</span><div class=sb-f><div class=sb-i style=width:'+trust+'%></div></div><span class=sb-p>'+trust+'%</span></div>';
        html+='<div class=mono>'+gv(c,'内心独白')+'</div></div></div>';
      }
    }

    html+='<div class=footer>'+gv(sc,'地点')+' · 阳光把窗帘晒得发烫 · 她在想他</div>';

    document.getElementById('root').innerHTML=html;
    var headers=document.querySelectorAll('.girl-h');
    for(var i=0;i<headers.length;i++){(function(h){
      h.addEventListener('click',function(){
        var body=h.nextElementSibling,arrow=h.querySelector('.gf');
        if(body)body.classList.toggle('collapsed');
        if(arrow)arrow.classList.toggle('open');
      });
    })(headers[i])}
  }catch(e){document.getElementById('root').innerHTML='<div class=placeholder style=color:#e84393>'+e.message+'</div>'}
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
```
